## **Review Themes** {#review-themes}

### Loop Habit Tracker {#review-app-1}

   **Feature requests.**
      4 recent review(s) mention feature requests.
      **Why it matters:** Users are asking for missing capabilities. This can reveal roadmap opportunities.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Suraj Developer_, 4/5: "This app is very good but I see only one fault to sync this application to my other device. I hope developers make sync feature also"
            2. _Arya Shivaji_, 5/5: "please add subtasks option also profile interface with option of change of wallpaper."
            3. _Muhammad Noor-ul-amin Shams_, 5/5: "I have been using this app since 2016 and it is excellent. The notes feature is very useful and I really appreciate the updates added based on user suggestions. Please consider adding a **search option**, a **date-based comment view**, and a **horizontal left/right swipe between dates** so users can easily compare goals without opening each one separately. Also, it would be great to add a **school attendance tracking feature**, as my son also uses the app for daily records and Notes."
